constraints.name: range_bound
constraints.description: 对于每位参与者给定的最高得分要求 s,所选梯子的高度 h 必须满足其欧拉函数值 φ(h) ≥ s。

objective.description: Minimize the total cost of ladders such that each participant's ladder score meets or exceeds their required threshold.

invariants.name: additivity
invariants.description: The global minimum expenditure is the direct sum of independently minimized costs for each participant. Since ladder assignments are isolated per player and the total cost function is linear, the optimal solution decomposes into solving each participant's requirement separately and aggregating the results.
